products.name: PulseGo Essential
products.short_description: Affordable GPS fitness smartwatch with heart rate monitoring.
products.description: PulseGo Essential combines built-in GPS, continuous heart rate tracking, and all-day activity statistics in a lightweight design. Ideal for everyday fitness tracking on a budget.

products.name: CoreFit Lite
products.short_description: Slim everyday smartwatch with GPS and heart rate tracking.
products.description: CoreFit Lite offers built-in GPS, 24/7 heart rate monitoring, sleep tracking, and smart notifications in a slim, lightweight case. Perfect for daily wear and casual workouts.

products.name: FitPro Active
products.short_description: GPS running watch with advanced training metrics.
products.description: FitPro Active is built for runners, featuring precise GPS, continuous heart rate tracking, cadence and VO2 max estimates, and guided interval workouts. Lightweight design for everyday training.

products.name: FitPro Elite
products.short_description: Premium GPS running smartwatch with extended battery life.
products.description: FitPro Elite upgrades your training with multi-band GPS, advanced recovery insights, and up to 60 hours of battery life in GPS mode, all under a sleek, durable shell.

products.name: AeroRun Feather
products.description: AeroRun Feather is designed for serious runners who want the lightest possible watch. It offers accurate GPS, wrist-based heart rate, and running dynamics in a 34g body.

products.name: AquaTrack Pro
products.short_description: Swim-proof GPS smartwatch for pool and open water.
products.description: AquaTrack Pro is built for swimmers and triathletes, featuring 50m water resistance, swim-proof construction, built-in GPS, and advanced lap, stroke, and SWOLF tracking.

products.name: DailyFit Mini
products.short_description: Compact everyday fitness watch without GPS.
products.description: DailyFit Mini tracks steps, calories, sleep, and notifications in a small, colorful package. Ideal for users who don’t need built-in GPS.

products.name: VividView Neo
products.short_description: New-release smartwatch with always-on AMOLED display.
products.description: VividView Neo features an ultra-bright always-on AMOLED display, built-in GPS, 24/7 heart rate monitoring, and advanced sleep and stress insights. Available now for pre-order.

products.name: VividView Ultra
products.short_description: Flagship always-on smartwatch with premium materials.
products.description: VividView Ultra adds sapphire glass, a titanium frame, and longer battery life to the VividView family, with the same always-on AMOLED display and advanced health tracking.

products.name: FlexiSport Silicone Band
products.description: The FlexiSport Silicone Band is lightweight, sweat-resistant, and designed for intense workouts. Quick-release pins make it easy to swap bands before your next session.

products.name: Urban Luxe Leather Band
products.short_description: Premium leather band for work and evenings out.
products.description: Urban Luxe Leather Band adds a refined look to your smartwatch with genuine leather, contrast stitching, and a secure stainless steel buckle.

products.name: SteelLink Metal Band
products.short_description: Stainless steel link bracelet with adjustable clasp.
products.description: SteelLink Metal Band transforms your fitness smartwatch into a dress watch with brushed stainless steel links and a secure butterfly clasp.

products.name: SoftTouch Fabric Band
products.short_description: Breathable fabric band for all-day comfort.
products.description: SoftTouch Fabric Band uses a lightweight woven material with a hook-and-loop closure, perfect for all-day wear and sleep tracking.

products.name: FitCoach Basic Monthly
products.description: FitCoach Basic Monthly includes personalized workout suggestions, basic meal guidance, and access to guided video sessions tailored to your fitness level.

products.name: FitCoach Plus Monthly
products.short_description: Advanced monthly coaching with form feedback and plans.
products.description: FitCoach Plus Monthly adds custom training plans, in-depth progress analytics, and chat access to certified coaches for ongoing accountability.

products.name: FitCoach Annual
products.short_description: Annual subscription with discounted coaching access.
products.description: FitCoach Annual offers a full year of premium coaching, including all Plus features at a discounted yearly rate, ideal for long-term commitment to your goals.

products.name: Wireless Charging Dock
products.short_description: Magnetic wireless charging dock for compatible watches.
products.description: Keep your smartwatch powered with this compact magnetic wireless charging dock, featuring a non-slip base and USB-C connection.

support_articles.title: How to Replace the Band on Your CoreFit Lite
support_articles.summary: Step-by-step instructions for removing and installing new bands on the CoreFit Lite smartwatch.
support_articles.content:
This guide walks you through changing the band on your CoreFit Lite.

1. Place your CoreFit Lite face down on a soft cloth.
2. Locate the quick-release pin on the underside of the band near the lugs.
3. Slide the pin inward to release the spring bar from the watch body.
4. Gently lift the band away and repeat for the other side.
5. To attach a new band, insert one end of the spring bar into the lug hole.
6. While sliding the quick-release pin inward, align the opposite end with the second lug hole and release the pin.
7. Tug gently on the band to ensure it is securely seated.

You can use compatible silicone or leather bands such as the FlexiSport Silicone Band or Urban Luxe Leather Band. Always confirm the correct size (Small, Medium, or Large) before installation.

support_articles.title: CoreFit Lite Quick Start Guide
support_articles.summary: Learn how to power on, pair, and complete the initial setup for your CoreFit Lite.
support_articles.content: To get started with your CoreFit Lite, fully charge the watch using the included cable. Press and hold the side button for three seconds to power on. Download the companion app from the iOS App Store or Google Play, then follow on-screen instructions to pair via Bluetooth. Once connected, set your units, wrist preference, and notification permissions. We recommend wearing the watch one finger-width above your wrist bone for optimal heart rate accuracy.

support_articles.title: Choosing the Right Band Size for Your Wrist
support_articles.summary: Find the correct Small, Medium, or Large band size for your smartwatch, including guidance for a 6-inch wrist.
support_articles.content:
Our bands are offered in Small, Medium, and Large sizes.

Recommended sizing:
- Small: 5.1–6.3 inch (130–160 mm) wrists
- Medium: 6.1–7.3 inch (155–185 mm) wrists
- Large: 7.1–8.7 inch (180–220 mm) wrists

For a 6-inch wrist, we recommend a Small band for a snug athletic fit, or a Medium band if you prefer a slightly looser feel. Measure your wrist with a flexible tape and compare to the ranges above before ordering.

support_articles.title: Installing the FlexiSport Silicone Band
support_articles.summary: Instructions for attaching and adjusting the FlexiSport Silicone Band on compatible smartwatches.
support_articles.content:
The FlexiSport Silicone Band uses quick-release pins to simplify installation.

1. Verify that your smartwatch uses a standard 20 mm connector.
2. Align the short end of the band with the top of the watch.
3. Insert one side of the spring bar into the lug, then slide the quick-release pin inward.
4. Position the opposite end in the remaining lug hole and release.
5. Repeat for the longer band piece.
6. Adjust the strap so it is snug but comfortable; you should be able to slip one finger under the band.

The FlexiSport Silicone Band is water- and sweat-resistant and is suitable for DailyFit Mini, CoreFit Lite, FitPro Active, and several other models.

support_articles.title: Caring for Your Urban Luxe Leather Band
support_articles.summary: Care and cleaning tips to extend the life of your Urban Luxe Leather Band.
support_articles.content:
Leather bands such as the Urban Luxe Leather Band are not designed for swimming or heavy sweating.

- Avoid submerging the band in water.
- Remove the band before showering or swimming.
- Wipe with a dry, soft cloth after workouts.
- Use a leather conditioner sparingly if the strap becomes dry.

If you frequently swim or sweat, consider using a FlexiSport Silicone Band for activities and reserving the leather band for everyday wear.

support_articles.title: Understanding Swim-Proof and Water Resistance Ratings
support_articles.summary: Learn the difference between splash-resistant, swim-proof, 50m, and 100m water resistance ratings.
support_articles.content:
Our smartwatches use several water resistance ratings:

- Splash-resistant: Safe for light rain and hand washing; not suitable for swimming.
- Swim-proof: Designed for surface swimming in pools; avoid high-velocity water and deep diving.
- 50m water resistant: Suitable for swimming, snorkeling, and frequent pool use.
- 100m water resistant: Suitable for high-intensity swimming and extended water exposure.

Models like AquaTrack Pro (100m) and VividView Neo (swim-proof) are recommended for swimmers. Always ensure the band material (such as silicone) is appropriate for water use.

support_articles.title: Setting Up Swim Tracking on AquaTrack Pro
support_articles.summary: Configure pool length, stroke detection, and lap counting on AquaTrack Pro.
support_articles.content:
To set up swim tracking on AquaTrack Pro:

1. Open the Workout app on your watch.
2. Select Pool Swim or Open Water Swim.
3. For Pool Swim, set the pool length (yards or meters) to match your pool.
4. Tighten the silicone band so the watch does not slide on your wrist.
5. Start the workout and swim normally. The watch will automatically detect strokes and laps.

AquaTrack Pro is water resistant to 100m. Rinse the watch and band with fresh water after swimming in salt or chlorinated water and dry thoroughly.

support_articles.title: Battery Life Differences: FitPro Active vs FitPro Elite
support_articles.summary: Compare typical and maximum battery life expectations for FitPro Active and FitPro Elite.
support_articles.content:
FitPro Active and FitPro Elite are both designed for runners, but they offer different battery profiles.

- FitPro Active: Up to 40 hours in smartwatch mode and up to 18 hours with continuous GPS.
- FitPro Elite: Up to 60 hours in smartwatch mode and up to 30 hours with continuous GPS.

Actual battery life depends on features like always-on heart rate, backlight usage, and notifications. Turning off unnecessary alerts and reducing screen brightness can extend battery life on both models.

support_articles.title: Charging Your Smartwatch Safely
support_articles.summary: General charging recommendations for PulseGo Essential, CoreFit Lite, VividView, and other models.
support_articles.content:
Use the original charging cable and a certified USB power adapter (5V/1A or 5V/2A) whenever possible. Avoid using fast chargers above 12W.

- Attach the magnetic charging puck so the pins align with the watch.
- Place the watch on a flat, well-ventilated surface.
- Charge between 20% and 80% for best long-term battery health.

It is safe to leave the watch on the charger overnight occasionally, but frequent overnight charging may shorten overall battery lifespan.

support_articles.title: Watch Will Not Power On or Charge
support_articles.summary: Troubleshooting steps if your smartwatch does not turn on or appear to charge.
support_articles.content:
If your watch does not power on:

1. Clean the charging contacts on both the watch and cable with a soft, dry cloth.
2. Try a different USB power adapter and wall outlet.
3. Force restart by holding the side button for 15 seconds.
4. If the screen shows a low-battery icon, allow at least 30 minutes of charging.

If the watch still does not respond, contact support with your model name (e.g., PulseGo Essential, DailyFit Mini, VividView Neo) and proof of purchase.

support_articles.title: Improving GPS Accuracy for Running Workouts
support_articles.summary: Tips to improve GPS accuracy on FitPro Active, FitPro Elite, and AeroRun Feather.
support_articles.content:
For the best GPS accuracy:

- Start your run in an open area away from tall buildings.
- Wait for the GPS-ready indicator before you begin.
- Wear the watch on the top of your wrist, snug but comfortable.
- Keep your phones Bluetooth turned on if you use connected GPS.

FitPro Active, FitPro Elite, and AeroRun Feather all support multi-satellite systems, which can improve signal lock times and accuracy during runs.

support_articles.title: Managing Fitness Goals in FitCoach Subscriptions
support_articles.summary: Change your goal (such as Weight loss or Running performance) in FitCoach Basic and Plus plans.
support_articles.content:
FitCoach Basic Monthly and FitCoach Plus Monthly let you select primary goals like Weight loss, General fitness, Running performance, and Strength.

To change your goal:
1. Open the app and go to the Coaching tab.
2. Tap Manage Plan > Fitness Goal.
3. Choose a new goal, such as Weight loss, and confirm.

Your weekly workouts and recommendations will adjust automatically within 24 hours.

support_articles.title: Configuring the Always-On Display on VividView Neo
support_articles.summary: Learn how to enable, customize, and optimize battery life with the always-on display on VividView Neo.
support_articles.content:
VividView Neo offers an always-on AMOLED display for at-a-glance stats.

To enable:
1. On your watch, open Settings > Display.
2. Toggle Always-On Display to On.
3. Choose your preferred watch face style.

To save battery, reduce screen brightness, shorten the timeout for raise-to-wake, and disable always-on during sleep hours.

support_articles.title: Setting Up Notifications on DailyFit Mini
support_articles.summary: Control which calls, texts, and app alerts appear on your DailyFit Mini.
support_articles.content:
To manage notifications for DailyFit Mini:

1. Pair your watch with the mobile app.
2. In the app, open Device Settings > Notifications.
3. Enable or disable calls, texts, calendar events, and individual app alerts.
4. On iOS, ensure Bluetooth permissions and notification access are granted in system settings.

Too many notifications can shorten battery life, so we recommend enabling only the most important alerts.

support_articles.title: Warranty and Extended Protection Plan Overview
support_articles.summary: Understand what is covered by the standard warranty and 1-, 2-, and 3-year extended plans.
support_articles.content:
All smartwatches include a standard limited warranty covering manufacturing defects for one year. You can optionally add:

- 1-Year Extended Warranty: Adds one extra year of coverage for defects and hardware failures.
- 2-Year Extended Warranty: Adds two extra years plus priority replacement service.
- 3-Year Premium Protection: Three years of coverage, including accidental damage on eligible smartwatches and bands.

Cosmetic damage, loss, and theft are not covered. For full terms, see the Warranty section of your order confirmation.
